fullText: Here's how to get set up with Sonar CubeCloud in under a minute. Head over to sonarssource.com. Hit get started. Click GitHub. Hit get started with GitHub. Authenticate. You should be redirected to this GitHub page. Select all repository. After a couple seconds, select free. Hit create organization. You're signed up with GitHub. Hit analyze a new project. Choose your project. Select a code definition for the project. Then we'll do previous version and then hit create project. After a while, it prepare the analysis. And just like that, we have a score for security, reliability, maintainability, and security hotspots along with a percentage of code coverage and duplicated code.
